message:
So there I was, mid-storm, trying to call my mom to check if she still had power on her end—and my phone hit 2%. *Of course.* I'd been using it as a flashlight AND scrolling (okay, stress-scrolling) for the past hour. Suddenly I'm fumbling around in the dark, phone dying, and realizing I had zero way to charge it. No power bank, no backup plan.

Now whenever the weather looks iffy, I actually charge a power bank ahead of time and toss a small LED flashlight in the junk drawer. Sounds boring, but honestly? Huge relief knowing my phone won't be a dead brick when I actually need it.

Do you usually remember to prep your power banks, or does that always catch you by surprise too?
